claim: Agentic engineering means building the thing that builds the thing, where engineers focus on creating systems and scaffolding that leverage AI agents rather than trying to eliminate human involvement
actionable: When designing agent systems, structure your architecture around human augmentation and oversight rather than full automation - humans should remain the decision-makers with agents handling execution
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF | Paul Everitt: The Shift to Agentic Engineering

claim: Only 27% of AI work at Anthropic went to entirely new capabilities that couldn't have been possible without AI; most was productivity optimization
actionable: When evaluating AI implementations, distinguish between time-savings on existing work versus genuinely novel capabilities - focus investments on the latter
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF | Paul Everitt: The Shift to Agentic Engineering

claim: Red-green testing (write failing tests first) works exceptionally well with coding agents because the agent learns your testing style and can mimic it
actionable: When working with AI coding agents, write broken tests as the first step before asking the agent to implement; this teaches the agent your test patterns
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF | Paul Everitt: The Shift to Agentic Engineering

claim: Modularity principles must be rethought for agentic systems - code should be reorganized around the needs of parallel sub-agents and specialized agent types rather than traditional software engineering principles
actionable: When refactoring large codebases for agent-driven development, reorganize modules to support agent parallelization and specialization rather than following traditional DRY/SOLID principles
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF | Paul Everitt: The Shift to Agentic Engineering

claim: Spec-driven development where humans write specifications is the way for humans to steer agent work and keep stakeholders aligned in agentic systems
actionable: Use written specifications as the primary interface between humans and AI agents; ensure all stakeholders co-author specs to maintain alignment
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF | Paul Everitt: The Shift to Agentic Engineering

claim: Evals are critical for agentic systems - you need to measure not just code quality but also budget efficiency (tokens used, turns taken, cost per task)
actionable: Build comprehensive eval frameworks for agent systems that measure code quality, latency, token efficiency, and cost-per-task completion
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF | Paul Everitt: The Shift to Agentic Engineering
